channel.title: Discordance on Zuluhotel Omega
channel.description: Recent content in Discordance on Zuluhotel Omega
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2024 Zuluhotel Omega. All Rights Reserved.

item.title: Discordance
item.description:
To use discordance you will need to have an instrument in your backpack.

Discordance check both discordance skill and musicianship skill to see if you succeed.

If you manage to successfully discordance a npc it will turn of war mode and start to follow you.

Range and follow time will increase with skill and specialization in bard class.

Npcs Skill required
a Dog 3
a Rabbit 5
Bird 5
a Gorilla 5
a Rabbit 5
a Squirrel 5
a Ferret 5
a Chicken 5
a Raven 10
a Bird Dog 10
a Hunting Dog 10
a Guard Dog 10
